Ber (rune 30) can drop from Hell Hellforge (guaranteed Hel-Gul range, rarely higher), Hell Countess (max Ist), or monster drops in Hell areas with TC87 potential. Best reliable sources: 大量刷普通怪 in Chaos Sanctuary or Worldstone Keep, or trading. ilvl of area must support the TC.

facts.snippet: In Diablo II: Resurrected, killing the Cow King no longer prevents the player from opening the Secret Cow Level portal in the same difficulty. This is a significant quality-of-life change from legacy Diablo II.

Cow King's Leathers is a 3-piece set with notable MF bonus. Pieces: Cow King's Horns (War Hat), Cow King's Hide (Embossed Plate), Cow King's Hooves (Heavy Boots). 3-piece set bonus: +100% Magic Find, +5 Life per Kill. Cow King can be killed with set equipped to prevent 'killing the cow king bug' (red portal lockout). In D2R the portal lockout mechanics still apply — killing Cow King can lock out current game's portal but not future games.

To enter the Secret Cow Level, transmute Wirt's Leg and a Tome of Town Portal in the Horadric Cube while in the Rogue Encampment (Act 1).
Formula: Wirt's Leg + Tome of Town Portal = Red Portal

Formula: Wirt's Leg + Tome of Town Portal = Red Portal

facts.snippet: When Shenk the Overseer dies, a series of catapult shots rain down on his location, killing all nearby monsters. This 'death event' is purely cosmetic for players but clears the immediate area.

Death's Fathom is a Unique Dimensional Shard (Sorceress orb). qlvl: 82. Key mods: +3 to Sorceress Skills, +20% FCR, +15-30% Cold Skill Damage, -20% to Enemy Cold Resistance, All Resistances +25-40. Best weapon for cold Sorceress builds (Blizzard/FO) due to cold pierce + damage amplification.

Death Cleaver is a Unique Berserker Axe. Two-Hand Damage: 151-298. +200-240% Enhanced Damage. +50% Damage to Undead. 66% Deadly Strike. 50% Chance of Crushing Blow. -33% Target Defense. 7% Life Stolen per Hit. +30% Increased Attack Speed. qlvl: 85 (elite, TC87). Extremely high Deadly Strike (66%) and Crushing Blow (50%) combo makes it powerful for physical damage builds. Berserker Axe base with high IAS. Often used in Whirlwind Barbarian or Berserk builds.

facts.snippet:
Nihlathak uses Corpse Explosion (CE) which deals 10-20% of the corpse's maximum life as Physical and Fire damage. This is the primary danger when farming him.
Formula: 50% Physical + 50% Fire damage

Nihlathak's Corpse Explosion (CE) deals 50% physical and 50% fire damage based on the corpse's base hit points. In Hell, this damage is extremely lethal. Using 'Slain Monsters Rest in Peace' (e.g., from Nature's Peace) prevents him from using it.
When Shenk the Overseer dies, a series of catapult shots rain down on his location, killing all nearby monsters. This 'death event' is purely cosmetic for players but clears the immediate area.

Duriel is notorious for dropping multiple Town Portal scrolls, but in Hell difficulty, he remains a significant source for high-end unique jewelry and charms.

facts.snippet: The Moat Trick involves luring Mephisto to the edge of the moat in Durance of Hate Level 3, where he can be attacked from a distance while his AI fails to reach the player. This remains effective in D2R.

Hephasto drops the Hellforge Hammer required for the Act 4 quest. He is always Spectral Hit and has a high chance of having damaging Auras like Fanaticism or Conviction due to his boss modifiers.

Nihlathak uses Corpse Explosion (CE) which deals 10-20% of the corpse's maximum life as Physical and Fire damage. This is the primary danger when farming him.
Formula: 50% Physical + 50% Fire damage

Nihlathak's Corpse Explosion (CE) deals 50% physical and 50% fire damage based on the corpse's base hit points. In Hell, this damage is extremely lethal. Using 'Slain Monsters Rest in Peace' (e.g., from Nature's Peace) prevents him from using it.
When Shenk the Overseer dies, a series of catapult shots rain down on his location, killing all nearby monsters. This 'death event' is purely cosmetic for players but clears the immediate area.

facts.snippet: Pindleskin is mlvl 86 in Hell and can drop from TC87. However, he cannot drop Arachnid Mesh, Azurewrath, or Tyrael's Might because their qlvl/mlvl requirements exceed his specific limitations despite his TC access.
Treasure Class selection determines the drop entry/base item pool before quality (unique/set/rare/magic) is applied.

Ber (rune 30) can drop from Hell Hellforge (guaranteed Hel-Gul range, rarely higher), Hell Countess (max Ist), or monster drops in Hell areas with TC87 potential. Best reliable sources: 大量刷普通怪 in Chaos Sanctuary or Worldstone Keep, or trading. ilvl of area must support the TC.

facts.snippet: In Diablo II: Resurrected, killing the Cow King no longer prevents the player from opening the Secret Cow Level portal in the same difficulty. This is a significant quality-of-life change from legacy Diablo II.

Cow King's Leathers is a 3-piece set with notable MF bonus. Pieces: Cow King's Horns (War Hat), Cow King's Hide (Embossed Plate), Cow King's Hooves (Heavy Boots). 3-piece set bonus: +100% Magic Find, +5 Life per Kill. Cow King can be killed with set equipped to prevent 'killing the cow king bug' (red portal lockout). In D2R the portal lockout mechanics still apply — killing Cow King can lock out current game's portal but not future games.

To enter the Secret Cow Level, transmute Wirt's Leg and a Tome of Town Portal in the Horadric Cube while in the Rogue Encampment (Act 1).
Formula: Wirt's Leg + Tome of Town Portal = Red Portal

Duriel is notorious for dropping multiple Town Portal scrolls, but in Hell difficulty, he remains a significant source for high-end unique jewelry and charms.

facts.snippet: The Moat Trick involves luring Mephisto to the edge of the moat in Durance of Hate Level 3, where he can be attacked from a distance while his AI fails to reach the player. This remains effective in D2R.

Bul-Kathos' Wedding Band is a Unique Ring. Key mods: +1 to All Skills, +0.5 Life per Character Level, +50 Life, 3-5% Life Stolen per Hit. qlvl: 85. Top tier ring for melee builds needing life leech and skills.
Hephasto drops the Hellforge Hammer required for the Act 4 quest. He is always Spectral Hit and has a high chance of having damaging Auras like Fanaticism or Conviction due to his boss modifiers.

facts.snippet:
Nihlathak uses Corpse Explosion (CE) which deals 10-20% of the corpse's maximum life as Physical and Fire damage. This is the primary danger when farming him.
Formula: 50% Physical + 50% Fire damage

Nihlathak's Corpse Explosion (CE) deals 50% physical and 50% fire damage based on the corpse's base hit points. In Hell, this damage is extremely lethal. Using 'Slain Monsters Rest in Peace' (e.g., from Nature's Peace) prevents him from using it.
When Shenk the Overseer dies, a series of catapult shots rain down on his location, killing all nearby monsters. This 'death event' is purely cosmetic for players but clears the immediate area.

facts.snippet: Pindleskin is mlvl 86 in Hell and can drop from TC87. However, he cannot drop Arachnid Mesh, Azurewrath, or Tyrael's Might because their qlvl/mlvl requirements exceed his specific limitations despite his TC access.
Treasure Class selection determines the drop entry/base item pool before quality (unique/set/rare/magic) is applied.

Ber (rune 30) can drop from Hell Hellforge (guaranteed Hel-Gul range, rarely higher), Hell Countess (max Ist), or monster drops in Hell areas with TC87 potential. Best reliable sources: 大量刷普通怪 in Chaos Sanctuary or Worldstone Keep, or trading. ilvl of area must support the TC.

facts.snippet: In Diablo II: Resurrected, killing the Cow King no longer prevents the player from opening the Secret Cow Level portal in the same difficulty. This is a significant quality-of-life change from legacy Diablo II.

Cow King's Leathers is a 3-piece set with notable MF bonus. Pieces: Cow King's Horns (War Hat), Cow King's Hide (Embossed Plate), Cow King's Hooves (Heavy Boots). 3-piece set bonus: +100% Magic Find, +5 Life per Kill. Cow King can be killed with set equipped to prevent 'killing the cow king bug' (red portal lockout). In D2R the portal lockout mechanics still apply — killing Cow King can lock out current game's portal but not future games.

To enter the Secret Cow Level, transmute Wirt's Leg and a Tome of Town Portal in the Horadric Cube while in the Rogue Encampment (Act 1).
Formula: Wirt's Leg + Tome of Town Portal = Red Portal

Formula: Wirt's Leg + Tome of Town Portal = Red Portal

Death's Fathom is a Unique Dimensional Shard (Sorceress orb). qlvl: 82. Key mods: +3 to Sorceress Skills, +20% FCR, +15-30% Cold Skill Damage, -20% to Enemy Cold Resistance, All Resistances +25-40. Best weapon for cold Sorceress builds (Blizzard/FO) due to cold pierce + damage amplification.

Death Cleaver is a Unique Berserker Axe. Two-Hand Damage: 151-298. +200-240% Enhanced Damage. +50% Damage to Undead. 66% Deadly Strike. 50% Chance of Crushing Blow. -33% Target Defense. 7% Life Stolen per Hit. +30% Increased Attack Speed. qlvl: 85 (elite, TC87). Extremely high Deadly Strike (66%) and Crushing Blow (50%) combo makes it powerful for physical damage builds. Berserker Axe base with high IAS. Often used in Whirlwind Barbarian or Berserk builds.

facts.snippet: Phase Blade is an Elite Sword. Max sockets: 6. qlvl: 73. alvl: 73. Indestructible.

The Oculus is a Unique Swirling Crystal (orb). One-Hand Damage: 18-42 (base orb adds to spells). +3 to Sorceress Skill Levels. +5 to Teleport (Sorceress Only). +20% Faster Cast Rate. +20% Enhanced Defense. +20 to Vitality. +20 to Energy. All Resistances +20. 50% Better Chance of Getting Magic Items (MF). 5% Chance to Cast Level 1 Teleport when Struck (can be annoying in combat). qlvl=76 (elite). Classic MF Sorceress orb — +3 all Sorc skills, 50 MF, +20 FCR and all-res. The self-teleport proc is a known hazard in hardcore. Often replaced by Heart of the Oak at high end but remains excellent budget BiS.

In Diablo II: Resurrected, killing the Cow King no longer prevents the player from opening the Secret Cow Level portal in the same difficulty. This is a significant quality-of-life change from legacy Diablo II.

Cow King's Leathers is a 3-piece set with notable MF bonus. Pieces: Cow King's Horns (War Hat), Cow King's Hide (Embossed Plate), Cow King's Hooves (Heavy Boots). 3-piece set bonus: +100% Magic Find, +5 Life per Kill. Cow King can be killed with set equipped to prevent 'killing the cow king bug' (red portal lockout). In D2R the portal lockout mechanics still apply — killing Cow King can lock out current game's portal but not future games.

facts.snippet: The Countess has a special rune drop table independent of her item drop table. In Hell, she can drop runes up to Lo, but her special table only goes up to Ist. Common source for runes below Ist.
In Hell difficulty, The Countess is always Fire and Cold Immune.

Ber (rune 30) can drop from Hell Hellforge (guaranteed Hel-Gul range, rarely higher), Hell Countess (max Ist), or monster drops in Hell areas with TC87 potential. Best reliable sources: 大量刷普通怪 in Chaos Sanctuary or Worldstone Keep, or trading. ilvl of area must support the TC.

Duriel is notorious for dropping multiple Town Portal scrolls, but in Hell difficulty, he remains a significant source for high-end unique jewelry and charms.

facts.snippet:
Nihlathak uses Corpse Explosion (CE) which deals 10-20% of the corpse's maximum life as Physical and Fire damage. This is the primary danger when farming him.
Formula: 50% Physical + 50% Fire damage

Nihlathak's Corpse Explosion (CE) deals 50% physical and 50% fire damage based on the corpse's base hit points. In Hell, this damage is extremely lethal. Using 'Slain Monsters Rest in Peace' (e.g., from Nature's Peace) prevents him from using it.
When Shenk the Overseer dies, a series of catapult shots rain down on his location, killing all nearby monsters. This 'death event' is purely cosmetic for players but clears the immediate area.

facts.snippet:
Nihlathak uses Corpse Explosion (CE) which deals 10-20% of the corpse's maximum life as Physical and Fire damage. This is the primary danger when farming him.
Formula: 50% Physical + 50% Fire damage

Nihlathak's Corpse Explosion (CE) deals 50% physical and 50% fire damage based on the corpse's base hit points. In Hell, this damage is extremely lethal. Using 'Slain Monsters Rest in Peace' (e.g., from Nature's Peace) prevents him from using it.
When Shenk the Overseer dies, a series of catapult shots rain down on his location, killing all nearby monsters. This 'death event' is purely cosmetic for players but clears the immediate area.

facts.snippet:

Formula: Wirt's Leg + Tome of Town Portal = Red Portal

In Diablo II: Resurrected, killing the Cow King no longer prevents the player from opening the Secret Cow Level portal in the same difficulty. This is a significant quality-of-life change from legacy Diablo II.

Cow King's Leathers is a 3-piece set with notable MF bonus. Pieces: Cow King's Horns (War Hat), Cow King's Hide (Embossed Plate), Cow King's Hooves (Heavy Boots). 3-piece set bonus: +100% Magic Find, +5 Life per Kill. Cow King can be killed with set equipped to prevent 'killing the cow king bug' (red portal lockout). In D2R the portal lockout mechanics still apply — killing Cow King can lock out current game's portal but not future games.

facts.snippet: The Countess has a special rune drop table independent of her item drop table. In Hell, she can drop runes up to Lo, but her special table only goes up to Ist. Common source for runes below Ist.
In Hell difficulty, The Countess is always Fire and Cold Immune.

Ber (rune 30) can drop from Hell Hellforge (guaranteed Hel-Gul range, rarely higher), Hell Countess (max Ist), or monster drops in Hell areas with TC87 potential. Best reliable sources: 大量刷普通怪 in Chaos Sanctuary or Worldstone Keep, or trading. ilvl of area must support the TC.

facts.snippet:
Andariel has a base -50% Fire Resistance in all difficulties, making fire damage particularly effective against her.
Formula: Fire Resistance = -50%

Andariel's Visage is a Unique Demonhead. qlvl: 83. Key mods: +2 All Skills, 20% IAS, +25-30 Strength, Life Leech 8-10%, Level 3 Poison Nova on Hit, -30% Fire Resistance. Best in slot for many melee/hybrid builds for IAS + skills + leech combo.
Duriel is notorious for dropping multiple Town Portal scrolls, but in Hell difficulty, he remains a significant source for high-end unique jewelry and charms.

facts.snippet: The Moat Trick involves luring Mephisto to the edge of the moat in Durance of Hate Level 3, where he can be attacked from a distance while his AI fails to reach the player. This remains effective in D2R.

Bul-Kathos' Wedding Band is a Unique Ring. Key mods: +1 to All Skills, +0.5 Life per Character Level, +50 Life, 3-5% Life Stolen per Hit. qlvl: 85. Top tier ring for melee builds needing life leech and skills.
Hephasto drops the Hellforge Hammer required for the Act 4 quest. He is always Spectral Hit and has a high chance of having damaging Auras like Fanaticism or Conviction due to his boss modifiers.

facts.snippet: Hephasto drops the Hellforge Hammer required for the Act 4 quest. He is always Spectral Hit and has a high chance of having damaging Auras like Fanaticism or Conviction due to his boss modifiers.
Magic Find affects the chance for an item to be Unique/Set/Rare/Magic, but does not directly change which base item (or Treasure Class selection) drops.
Nightmare Andariel is mathematically the best source for farming The Stone of Jordan (SoJ) due to her jewelry-heavy drop table and lower item level requirements exclude many other unique rings.

facts.snippet: Phase Blade is an Elite Sword. Max sockets: 6. qlvl: 73. alvl: 73. Indestructible.

The Oculus is a Unique Swirling Crystal (orb). One-Hand Damage: 18-42 (base orb adds to spells). +3 to Sorceress Skill Levels. +5 to Teleport (Sorceress Only). +20% Faster Cast Rate. +20% Enhanced Defense. +20 to Vitality. +20 to Energy. All Resistances +20. 50% Better Chance of Getting Magic Items (MF). 5% Chance to Cast Level 1 Teleport when Struck (can be annoying in combat). qlvl=76 (elite). Classic MF Sorceress orb — +3 all Sorc skills, 50 MF, +20 FCR and all-res. The self-teleport proc is a known hazard in hardcore. Often replaced by Heart of the Oak at high end but remains excellent budget BiS.

To enter the Secret Cow Level, transmute Wirt's Leg and a Tome of Town Portal in the Horadric Cube while in the Rogue Encampment (Act 1).
Formula: Wirt's Leg + Tome of Town Portal = Red Portal

facts.snippet:
Nihlathak uses Corpse Explosion (CE) which deals 10-20% of the corpse's maximum life as Physical and Fire damage. This is the primary danger when farming him.
Formula: 50% Physical + 50% Fire damage

Nihlathak's Corpse Explosion (CE) deals 50% physical and 50% fire damage based on the corpse's base hit points. In Hell, this damage is extremely lethal. Using 'Slain Monsters Rest in Peace' (e.g., from Nature's Peace) prevents him from using it.
When Shenk the Overseer dies, a series of catapult shots rain down on his location, killing all nearby monsters. This 'death event' is purely cosmetic for players but clears the immediate area.

Formula: Wirt's Leg + Tome of Town Portal = Red Portal

In Diablo II: Resurrected, killing the Cow King no longer prevents the player from opening the Secret Cow Level portal in the same difficulty. This is a significant quality-of-life change from legacy Diablo II.

Cow King's Leathers is a 3-piece set with notable MF bonus. Pieces: Cow King's Horns (War Hat), Cow King's Hide (Embossed Plate), Cow King's Hooves (Heavy Boots). 3-piece set bonus: +100% Magic Find, +5 Life per Kill. Cow King can be killed with set equipped to prevent 'killing the cow king bug' (red portal lockout). In D2R the portal lockout mechanics still apply — killing Cow King can lock out current game's portal but not future games.

facts.snippet: The Countess has a special rune drop table independent of her item drop table. In Hell, she can drop runes up to Lo, but her special table only goes up to Ist. Common source for runes below Ist.
In Hell difficulty, The Countess is always Fire and Cold Immune.

Ber (rune 30) can drop from Hell Hellforge (guaranteed Hel-Gul range, rarely higher), Hell Countess (max Ist), or monster drops in Hell areas with TC87 potential. Best reliable sources: 大量刷普通怪 in Chaos Sanctuary or Worldstone Keep, or trading. ilvl of area must support the TC.

facts.snippet: Nightmare Andariel is mathematically the best source for farming The Stone of Jordan (SoJ) due to her jewelry-heavy drop table and lower item level requirements exclude many other unique rings.

In Diablo II: Resurrected, killing the Cow King no longer prevents the player from opening the Secret Cow Level portal in the same difficulty. This is a significant quality-of-life change from legacy Diablo II.

To enter the Secret Cow Level, transmute Wirt's Leg and a Tome of Town Portal in the Horadric Cube while in the Rogue Encampment (Act 1).
Formula: Wirt's Leg + Tome of Town Portal = Red Portal

facts.snippet: Phase Blade is an Elite Sword. Max sockets: 6. qlvl: 73. alvl: 73. Indestructible.

The Oculus is a Unique Swirling Crystal (orb). One-Hand Damage: 18-42 (base orb adds to spells). +3 to Sorceress Skill Levels. +5 to Teleport (Sorceress Only). +20% Faster Cast Rate. +20% Enhanced Defense. +20 to Vitality. +20 to Energy. All Resistances +20. 50% Better Chance of Getting Magic Items (MF). 5% Chance to Cast Level 1 Teleport when Struck (can be annoying in combat). qlvl=76 (elite). Classic MF Sorceress orb — +3 all Sorc skills, 50 MF, +20 FCR and all-res. The self-teleport proc is a known hazard in hardcore. Often replaced by Heart of the Oak at high end but remains excellent budget BiS.

facts.snippet:
Nihlathak uses Corpse Explosion (CE) which deals 10-20% of the corpse's maximum life as Physical and Fire damage. This is the primary danger when farming him.
Formula: 50% Physical + 50% Fire damage

Nihlathak's Corpse Explosion (CE) deals 50% physical and 50% fire damage based on the corpse's base hit points. In Hell, this damage is extremely lethal. Using 'Slain Monsters Rest in Peace' (e.g., from Nature's Peace) prevents him from using it.
When Shenk the Overseer dies, a series of catapult shots rain down on his location, killing all nearby monsters. This 'death event' is purely cosmetic for players but clears the immediate area.

In Diablo II: Resurrected, killing the Cow King no longer prevents the player from opening the Secret Cow Level portal in the same difficulty. This is a significant quality-of-life change from legacy Diablo II.

Cow King's Leathers is a 3-piece set with notable MF bonus. Pieces: Cow King's Horns (War Hat), Cow King's Hide (Embossed Plate), Cow King's Hooves (Heavy Boots). 3-piece set bonus: +100% Magic Find, +5 Life per Kill. Cow King can be killed with set equipped to prevent 'killing the cow king bug' (red portal lockout). In D2R the portal lockout mechanics still apply — killing Cow King can lock out current game's portal but not future games.

facts.snippet: The Countess has a special rune drop table independent of her item drop table. In Hell, she can drop runes up to Lo, but her special table only goes up to Ist. Common source for runes below Ist.
In Hell difficulty, The Countess is always Fire and Cold Immune.

Ber (rune 30) can drop from Hell Hellforge (guaranteed Hel-Gul range, rarely higher), Hell Countess (max Ist), or monster drops in Hell areas with TC87 potential. Best reliable sources: 大量刷普通怪 in Chaos Sanctuary or Worldstone Keep, or trading. ilvl of area must support the TC.

Duriel is notorious for dropping multiple Town Portal scrolls, but in Hell difficulty, he remains a significant source for high-end unique jewelry and charms.

facts.snippet: The Moat Trick involves luring Mephisto to the edge of the moat in Durance of Hate Level 3, where he can be attacked from a distance while his AI fails to reach the player. This remains effective in D2R.

Bul-Kathos' Wedding Band is a Unique Ring. Key mods: +1 to All Skills, +0.5 Life per Character Level, +50 Life, 3-5% Life Stolen per Hit. qlvl: 85. Top tier ring for melee builds needing life leech and skills.
Hephasto drops the Hellforge Hammer required for the Act 4 quest. He is always Spectral Hit and has a high chance of having damaging Auras like Fanaticism or Conviction due to his boss modifiers.

facts.snippet: Phase Blade is an Elite Sword. Max sockets: 6. qlvl: 73. alvl: 73. Indestructible.

The Oculus is a Unique Swirling Crystal (orb). One-Hand Damage: 18-42 (base orb adds to spells). +3 to Sorceress Skill Levels. +5 to Teleport (Sorceress Only). +20% Faster Cast Rate. +20% Enhanced Defense. +20 to Vitality. +20 to Energy. All Resistances +20. 50% Better Chance of Getting Magic Items (MF). 5% Chance to Cast Level 1 Teleport when Struck (can be annoying in combat). qlvl=76 (elite). Classic MF Sorceress orb — +3 all Sorc skills, 50 MF, +20 FCR and all-res. The self-teleport proc is a known hazard in hardcore. Often replaced by Heart of the Oak at high end but remains excellent budget BiS.

To enter the Secret Cow Level, transmute Wirt's Leg and a Tome of Town Portal in the Horadric Cube while in the Rogue Encampment (Act 1).
Formula: Wirt's Leg + Tome of Town Portal = Red Portal

facts.snippet:
Nihlathak uses Corpse Explosion (CE) which deals 10-20% of the corpse's maximum life as Physical and Fire damage. This is the primary danger when farming him.
Formula: 50% Physical + 50% Fire damage

Nihlathak's Corpse Explosion (CE) deals 50% physical and 50% fire damage based on the corpse's base hit points. In Hell, this damage is extremely lethal. Using 'Slain Monsters Rest in Peace' (e.g., from Nature's Peace) prevents him from using it.
When Shenk the Overseer dies, a series of catapult shots rain down on his location, killing all nearby monsters. This 'death event' is purely cosmetic for players but clears the immediate area.

facts.snippet:
To enter the Secret Cow Level, transmute Wirt's Leg and a Tome of Town Portal in the Horadric Cube while in the Rogue Encampment (Act 1).
Formula: Wirt's Leg + Tome of Town Portal = Red Portal

In Diablo II: Resurrected, killing the Cow King no longer prevents the player from opening the Secret Cow Level portal in the same difficulty. This is a significant quality-of-life change from legacy Diablo II.

Cow King's Leathers is a 3-piece set with notable MF bonus. Pieces: Cow King's Horns (War Hat), Cow King's Hide (Embossed Plate), Cow King's Hooves (Heavy Boots). 3-piece set bonus: +100% Magic Find, +5 Life per Kill. Cow King can be killed with set equipped to prevent 'killing the cow king bug' (red portal lockout). In D2R the portal lockout mechanics still apply — killing Cow King can lock out current game's portal but not future games.

facts.snippet: The Countess has a special rune drop table independent of her item drop table. In Hell, she can drop runes up to Lo, but her special table only goes up to Ist. Common source for runes below Ist.
In Hell difficulty, The Countess is always Fire and Cold Immune.

Ber (rune 30) can drop from Hell Hellforge (guaranteed Hel-Gul range, rarely higher), Hell Countess (max Ist), or monster drops in Hell areas with TC87 potential. Best reliable sources: 大量刷普通怪 in Chaos Sanctuary or Worldstone Keep, or trading. ilvl of area must support the TC.

facts.snippet:
Andariel has a base -50% Fire Resistance in all difficulties, making fire damage particularly effective against her.
Formula: Fire Resistance = -50%

Andariel's Visage is a Unique Demonhead. qlvl: 83. Key mods: +2 All Skills, 20% IAS, +25-30 Strength, Life Leech 8-10%, Level 3 Poison Nova on Hit, -30% Fire Resistance. Best in slot for many melee/hybrid builds for IAS + skills + leech combo.
Duriel is notorious for dropping multiple Town Portal scrolls, but in Hell difficulty, he remains a significant source for high-end unique jewelry and charms.

facts.snippet: The Moat Trick involves luring Mephisto to the edge of the moat in Durance of Hate Level 3, where he can be attacked from a distance while his AI fails to reach the player. This remains effective in D2R.

Bul-Kathos' Wedding Band is a Unique Ring. Key mods: +1 to All Skills, +0.5 Life per Character Level, +50 Life, 3-5% Life Stolen per Hit. qlvl: 85. Top tier ring for melee builds needing life leech and skills.
Hephasto drops the Hellforge Hammer required for the Act 4 quest. He is always Spectral Hit and has a high chance of having damaging Auras like Fanaticism or Conviction due to his boss modifiers.

facts.snippet: When Shenk the Overseer dies, a series of catapult shots rain down on his location, killing all nearby monsters. This 'death event' is purely cosmetic for players but clears the immediate area.

Death's Fathom is a Unique Dimensional Shard (Sorceress orb). qlvl: 82. Key mods: +3 to Sorceress Skills, +20% FCR, +15-30% Cold Skill Damage, -20% to Enemy Cold Resistance, All Resistances +25-40. Best weapon for cold Sorceress builds (Blizzard/FO) due to cold pierce + damage amplification.

Death Cleaver is a Unique Berserker Axe. Two-Hand Damage: 151-298. +200-240% Enhanced Damage. +50% Damage to Undead. 66% Deadly Strike. 50% Chance of Crushing Blow. -33% Target Defense. 7% Life Stolen per Hit. +30% Increased Attack Speed. qlvl: 85 (elite, TC87). Extremely high Deadly Strike (66%) and Crushing Blow (50%) combo makes it powerful for physical damage builds. Berserker Axe base with high IAS. Often used in Whirlwind Barbarian or Berserk builds.

facts.snippet: Sunder Charms are unique grand charms that break a specific immunity on the player (e.g., Cold Sunder breaks Cold Immunity on monsters but also reduces the player's cold resistance by 75). Sunder Charms can ONLY drop from Heralds in Terror Zones — they do not drop from any other source. There are 6 Sunder Charms: The Black Cleft (Physical), The Bone Break (Magic), The Cold Rupture (Cold), The Crack of the Heavens (Lightning), The Flame Rift (Fire), and The Rotting Fissure (Poison). Each Herald kill has a chance to drop a Sunder Charm, but it is not guaranteed. Farming Sunders requires repeatedly running TZ areas and killing Heralds.
The Countess has a special rune drop table independent of her item drop table. In Hell, she can drop runes up to Lo, but her special table only goes up to Ist. Common source for runes below Ist.
Nightmare Andariel is mathematically the best source for farming The Stone of Jordan (SoJ) due to her jewelry-heavy drop table and lower item level requirements exclude many other unique rings.

facts.snippet: Treasure Class selection determines the drop entry/base item pool before quality (unique/set/rare/magic) is applied.

Highlord's Wrath is a Unique Amulet. Key mods: +1 to All Skills, +20% Increased Attack Speed, +33% Lightning Resistance, +1 to Deadly Strike per Character Level (cap 99%), 35% Chance of Deadly Strike. qlvl: 65. Best physical melee amulet for Deadly Strike builds (Hammerdin excluded).

A Grand Charm must have sufficiently high ilvl (e.g., from Baal/Diablo/Nihlathak) to reach the affix level required for the 41-45 Life suffix (of Vita).
Formula: (high ilvl) -> high alvl -> allows Vita(41-45 life) suffix

sources.snippet: Treasure Class selection determines the drop entry/base item pool before quality (unique/set/rare/magic) is applied.

Highlord's Wrath is a Unique Amulet. Key mods: +1 to All Skills, +20% Increased Attack Speed, +33% Lightning Resistance, +1 to Deadly Strike per Character Level (cap 99%), 35% Chance of Deadly Strike. qlvl: 65. Best physical melee amulet for Deadly Strike builds (Hammerdin excluded).

A Grand Charm must have sufficiently high ilvl (e.g., from Baal/Diablo/Nihlathak) to reach the affix level required for the 41-45 Life suffix (of Vita).
Formula: (high ilvl) -> high alvl -> allows Vita(41-45 life) suffix

facts.snippet: Best locations for farming high runes (Lo, Sur, Ber, Jah, etc.): (1) Travincal (Hell) — Council members have high monster level and always drop from good treasure classes; fastest runs if you can clear quickly. (2) Lower Kurast (LK) super chests — in single player with /players 7-8, the super chests near campfires have fixed drop patterns that can produce HRs; less effective online. (3) Chaos Sanctuary — high monster density + level 85 area; good for combined loot and runes. (4) Cows (Secret Cow Level) — extreme monster density, all dropping from similar treasure classes. (5) Arcane Sanctuary — ghosts/wraiths have reduced drop tables (no armor/weapons), increasing rune drop chance; kill them over platforms so loot doesn't fall into the void. (6) Terror Zones with high density. (7) Flayer Jungle / Bloody Foothills — high density clearing. Key tip: Magic Find does NOT increase rune drops — prioritize kill speed over MF when rune farming. Running /players 3-5 (or full games online) increases the chance of rune drops per kill.

sources.snippet: Best locations for farming high runes (Lo, Sur, Ber, Jah, etc.): (1) Travincal (Hell) — Council members have high monster level and always drop from good treasure classes; fastest runs if you can clear quickly. (2) Lower Kurast (LK) super chests — in single player with /players 7-8, the super chests near campfires have fixed drop patterns that can produce HRs; less effective online. (3) Chaos Sanctuary — high monster density + level 85 area; good for combined loot and runes. (4) Cows (Secret Cow Level) — extreme monster density, all dropping from similar treasure classes. (5) Arcane Sanctuary — ghosts/wraiths have reduced drop tables (no armor/weapons), increasing rune drop chance; kill them over platforms so loot doesn't fall into the void. (6) Terror Zones with high density. (7) Flayer Jungle / Bloody Foothills — high density clearing. Key tip: Magic Find does NOT increase rune drops — prioritize kill speed over MF when rune farming. Running /players 3-5 (or full games online) increases the chance of rune drops per kill.

facts.snippet:
Nihlathak uses Corpse Explosion (CE) which deals 10-20% of the corpse's maximum life as Physical and Fire damage. This is the primary danger when farming him.
Formula: 50% Physical + 50% Fire damage

Nihlathak's Corpse Explosion (CE) deals 50% physical and 50% fire damage based on the corpse's base hit points. In Hell, this damage is extremely lethal. Using 'Slain Monsters Rest in Peace' (e.g., from Nature's Peace) prevents him from using it.

facts.snippet:
To enter the Secret Cow Level, transmute Wirt's Leg and a Tome of Town Portal in the Horadric Cube while in the Rogue Encampment (Act 1).
Formula: Wirt's Leg + Tome of Town Portal = Red Portal

In Diablo II: Resurrected, killing the Cow King no longer prevents the player from opening the Secret Cow Level portal in the same difficulty. This is a significant quality-of-life change from legacy Diablo II.

Cow King's Leathers is a 3-piece set with notable MF bonus. Pieces: Cow King's Horns (War Hat), Cow King's Hide (Embossed Plate), Cow King's Hooves (Heavy Boots). 3-piece set bonus: +100% Magic Find, +5 Life per Kill. Cow King can be killed with set equipped to prevent 'killing the cow king bug' (red portal lockout). In D2R the portal lockout mechanics still apply — killing Cow King can lock out current game's portal but not future games.

facts.snippet: The Countess has a special rune drop table independent of her item drop table. In Hell, she can drop runes up to Lo, but her special table only goes up to Ist. Common source for runes below Ist.
In Hell difficulty, The Countess is always Fire and Cold Immune.

Ber (rune 30) can drop from Hell Hellforge (guaranteed Hel-Gul range, rarely higher), Hell Countess (max Ist), or monster drops in Hell areas with TC87 potential. Best reliable sources: 大量刷普通怪 in Chaos Sanctuary or Worldstone Keep, or trading. ilvl of area must support the TC.

facts.snippet: When Shenk the Overseer dies, a series of catapult shots rain down on his location, killing all nearby monsters. This 'death event' is purely cosmetic for players but clears the immediate area.

Death's Fathom is a Unique Dimensional Shard (Sorceress orb). qlvl: 82. Key mods: +3 to Sorceress Skills, +20% FCR, +15-30% Cold Skill Damage, -20% to Enemy Cold Resistance, All Resistances +25-40. Best weapon for cold Sorceress builds (Blizzard/FO) due to cold pierce + damage amplification.

Death Cleaver is a Unique Berserker Axe. Two-Hand Damage: 151-298. +200-240% Enhanced Damage. +50% Damage to Undead. 66% Deadly Strike. 50% Chance of Crushing Blow. -33% Target Defense. 7% Life Stolen per Hit. +30% Increased Attack Speed. qlvl: 85 (elite, TC87). Extremely high Deadly Strike (66%) and Crushing Blow (50%) combo makes it powerful for physical damage builds. Berserker Axe base with high IAS. Often used in Whirlwind Barbarian or Berserk builds.
